name: Laurent Gébeau
title: IT speclialised in Microsoft technologies, co-owner of Axeperf.com.
bio:
Laurent Gébeau is living close to Paris, France.    

Laurent is Microsoft Certified (MCP) and has been troubleshooting Windows, network and computers problems since 1994.

In January 2004 Laurent was awarded Most Valuable Professional status (MVP) by Microsoft, renewed every year since.
